== Notes for [[Item:Q103245|Q103245]] ==

The Francos were a judeo convero family, originally from Toledo that in the second half of the fifteenth century settled in Valladolid, giving rise to an important family branch and close to royalty especially as Senior Accountants, and occupying positions as regidores of Valladolid. The story of Villafuerte de Esgueva begins when Garci Franco marries María de Sarabia, granddaughter of the important bishop of Burgos Pedro de Cartagena, also of Judeo-born origin, settling the marriage in Bellosillo and there he built his fortress, and changed the name of the place to be called Villafuerte de Esgueva

https://pantxike.wordpress.com/2014/11/25/villafuerte-de-esgueva/

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000081474843895

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
